title: CQM JSON (v1)
description: Contract between formulation providers (LLMs) and the solver pipeline. Every CQM the platform consumes — whether produced by Claude, OpenAI, a local LLM, or a hand-written test fixture — conforms to this schema.

description.description: Optional human description of the model. Carried through but not used by the compiler.

variables.description: All decision variables. Names must be unique.

constraints.description: May be empty (unconstrained problem). Constraint labels should be unique.

name.description: Stable variable identifier. Must match every reference in objective.linear/quadratic and constraints.*.linear/quadratic.

lower_bound.description: Required for integer and real variables. Ignored for binary.

upper_bound.description: Required for integer and real variables. Ignored for binary.

description.description: Human-readable explanation. Echoed into the variable_registry by the compiler.

linear.description: Map from variable name to its linear coefficient. Empty object is allowed.

quadratic.description: Map from "u*v" string keys (a single * delimiter, no spaces) to coefficients. Empty object is allowed.

label.description: Stable constraint identifier. Used in the validation harness's per-constraint coverage report.

type.description: Sense of the constraint. equality => lhs == rhs; inequality_le => lhs <= rhs; inequality_ge => lhs >= rhs.

expected_optimum.description: User-facing optimum (or best-known value). Always in the units of the objective sense (i.e. for maximize problems, the maximum value, not its negation). null when no ground truth exists.
